buildCommand: echo 'Publicando o build local do Flutter (build/web)'

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://images.unsplash.com https://*.unsplash.com https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://www.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://images.unsplash.com https://*.unsplash.com https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://www.gstatic.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'
